MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th June, 1991 G.S.R, 304(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of (i) the Fixed dose combination of Crude Ergot preparations and (ii) Chloral Hydrate as a drug are likely to involve risk to human beings and that it is necessary and expedient in the public interest so to do; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 26-A of the Drugs and Cos- metics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following amend- ment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare G.S.R. No.578(E), ('ated the 23rd July, 1983, namely :— 1, In the Table to the said notification :— 1. for serial number 16 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely :— 16 "Fixxl dose combinations of crude Ergot preparations except those containing Ergotamine, Caffeine, analgesics, antihistamines for the treatment of migraine, headaches." 2, After serial number 42 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be added, namely :— "43. Chloral Hydrate as a drug". [No. X.l 1014/9/90-DMS&PFA] BALB1R SINGH, Jt. Secy. Noto: Government of India, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare notification No. GSR 578(E), dated 23-7-1983 was amended by the following notifications published m the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (I) namely :— 1. G.S.R. 49(E), dated 3M-1984 2. G.S.R. 322(E), dated 3-5-1984 3. G.S.R. 863(E), dated 22-11-1985 4. G.S.R. 700(E). dated 15-6-1988 5. G.S.R. 1057(E), dated 3-11-1988 6. G.S.R. 743(E), dated 10-8-1989 7. G.S.R. 999(E), dated 26-12-1990 8. G.S.R. 69(E), dated 11-2-1991 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, DelbM 10054. 1991 -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
